settings.title: Monster Piercing | Circular/Horseshoe Barbells
settings.text: Horseshoe barbells, also referred to as circular barbells, are among the most versatile pieces of body jewellery available. Their distinct open-ended design, which resembles a horseshoe, makes them suitable for a variety of piercings, including septum, lip, eyebrow, and even nipple piercings. At Monster Piercing, our collection of horseshoe barbells comes in various sizes, materials, and styles to cater to different tastes and needs. Available in surgical steel, titanium, and gold, our horseshoe barbells are designed to ensure long-lasting wear and minimal irritation. What sets these barbells apart is the removable ends, which can be switched between balls, spikes, or other decorative attachments, allowing for easy customisation and frequent style changes. The curvature of the barbell ensures a comfortable fit in piercings that follow the natural curve of the body, while the secure threaded ends provide peace of mind for daily wear. Whether you’re looking for something simple and understated or bold and decorative, our horseshoe barbells provide a flexible and stylish option for multiple piercings.

settings.question: What is a CBB (circular barbell)?
settings.answer: A CBB, also known as a circular barbell or horseshoe ring, is a versatile piece of body jewellery shaped like a semi-circle with removable ball or decorative ends. It’s ideal for many piercings including septum, helix, daith, lobe, eyebrow, lip, and nipple piercings.

settings.question: What materials are your circular barbells made from?
settings.answer: We offer CBBs in implant-grade titanium, solid gold, 925 sterling silver, and 316L surgical steel. Each material is crafted for durability, comfort, and long-lasting shine. Our titanium and gold options are hypoallergenic and suitable for sensitive skin.

settings.question: Do your circular barbells have removable ends?
settings.answer: Yes. All our CBBs come with removable ends that can be unscrewed for easy insertion and cleaning. Depending on the design, the ends may feature plain balls, spikes, or gem-set tops.

settings.question: Can I wear a circular barbell in different piercings?
settings.answer: Yes. CBBs are one of the most versatile styles of body jewellery. They can be used in septum, daith, rook, eyebrow, lip, nipple, and ear piercings. Always make sure to use the correct gauge and diameter for your anatomy.
